risk_title: Governance and Institutional Capacity Constraints Affecting Health System Oversight
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as Substantial, with institutional capacity for implementation also rated as High risk. These constraints are directly impacting the project's ability to implement decentralization reforms and maintain oversight of service delivery and drug distribution at central level.
evidence_quote: improving decentralization of service delivery and drug distribution and oversight at central level

risk_title: Grievance Mechanism Non-Functionality Linked to Governance Fragility
risk_summary: The project's grievance redressal mechanism is not functioning, with zero grievances addressed as of June 2024. This has triggered an Environment & Social downgrade and reflects broader governance challenges in implementing accountability mechanisms.
evidence_quote: Grievances addressed each year (Percentage)... This indicator is not on track to meet 2024 or end of project ratings. This has resulted in the E&S downgrade. Ensuring its functionality is a key action for the task team and the PIU.

risk_title: Health Information System Reporting Delays Due to Contextual Instability
risk_summary: Health facility reporting timeliness is hindered by contextual factors including electricity and network disruptions, preventing timely submission of routine HMIS reports according to national guidelines. This reflects underlying governance and infrastructure fragility.
evidence_quote: Health facilities submitting timely routine/HMIS reports according to national guidelines (Percentage)... Despite improvements in data collection and reporting, the timeliness of submission is hindered by contextual factors (electricity, network).

risk_title: Persistent Delays in Health Facility Readiness Affecting Service Delivery
risk_summary: Significant delays in the readiness of health facilities are preventing the implementation of referral systems and service delivery improvements, indicating underlying institutional and governance capacity constraints.
evidence_quote: The number of referrals is lower than expected due to persistent delays in the readiness of health facilities and challenges and different referrals supported by the project (spokes to hospitals) not being accounted for under the current indicator.

risk_title: Community Health Worker Program Instability Due to Sectoral Reforms
risk_summary: The Community Health Worker program has experienced significant performance volatility due to ongoing reforms and data system transitions (paper-based to digital), affecting service delivery coverage and creating implementation uncertainty.
evidence_quote: The performance has varied considerably quarter by quarter due to reforms within the CHW program and changes in the data reporting system (from paper based to digital).
